title: Why did Mr. Gilbert telephone Dr. Millington?

meanings.usage: 表示医疗机构的通用词汇
表示某事取得了预期结果
作名词指电话设备，作动词指打电话
指电话系统的转接中心
修饰名词，表示不确定的某一个
用于被动语态be allowed to表示被允许做某事
指有血缘或婚姻关系的人
refuse to do sth. 表示拒绝做某事
the following day/week 表示第二天/下周
stay in hospital 表示住院

phrases.usage: 住院，表示生病或接受治疗而在医院

examples.en: John Gilbert was in hospital last week.
examples.zh: 约翰·吉尔伯特上周住院了。

phrases.usage: 第二天，指某事件之后的那一天

examples.en: The following day, the patient asked for a telephone.
examples.zh: 第二天，病人要了一个电话。

examples.en: He asked for a bedside telephone.
When he was alone, he telephoned the hospital.
examples.zh: 当他独自一人时，他给医院打了电话。

examples.en: He asked his doctor to tell him about the operation.
examples.zh: 他请求医生告诉他关于手术的情况。

examples.en: When would he be allowed to go home?
examples.zh: 什么时候他才被允许回家？

examples.en: He would have to stay in hospital for another two weeks.

examples.zh: 他给医院总机打了电话。

examples.en: Are you a relative of the patient?
The doctor refused to tell him.

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻或某一段时间正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去正在发生的事件背景

examples.en: While John Gilbert was in hospital, he asked his doctor to tell him...
examples.zh: 当约翰·吉尔伯特住院时，他请求医生告诉他...

grammar.title: 间接引语 (Indirect Speech)
grammar.definition: 转述别人的话，而不是直接引用
grammar.structure: 主句过去式 + that + 陈述句（人称、时态等相应变化）

examples.en: He asked if Mr. Gilbert's operation had been successful.
examples.zh: 他问吉尔伯特先生的手术是否成功。

grammar.title: 一般过去时 (Past Simple Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时间完成的动作或存在的状态
grammar.usage: 描述故事中一系列已完成的行动

examples.en: He telephoned the hospital exchange and asked for Doctor Millington.
examples.zh: 他给医院总机打电话，要找米灵顿医生。

original.en: He asked his doctor to tell him whether his operation had been successful.
original.zh: 他请求医生告诉他手术是否成功。

imitations.en: She asked her teacher to explain the grammar.
They asked me to wait outside.

original.en: When would Mr. Gilbert be allowed to go home?
original.zh: 什么时候允许吉尔伯特先生回家？

imitations.en: When will I be allowed to leave the hospital?
Children are not allowed to watch this film.
imitations.zh: 孩子们不被允许看这部电影。

original.en: While John Gilbert was in hospital, he asked his doctor...
original.zh: 当约翰·吉尔伯特住院时，他请求医生...

imitations.en: My grandmother is in hospital now.
He spent three months in hospital last year.
imitations.zh: 他去年住了三个月的医院。

original.en: He asked if Mr. Gilbert's operation had been successful.
original.zh: 他问吉尔伯特先生的手术是否成功。

imitations.en: She asked if I was feeling better.
imitations.zh: 她问我是否感觉好些了。

imitations.en: They asked whether the train had arrived.
imitations.zh: 他们问火车是否已经到了。
